notes: This ledger is the durable resume state for the Ralph source-spec refresh loop.
Current code in this worktree is the source of truth for source-backed specs.
Future/target specs must not be rewritten as current-code specs without an explicit decision.

queue.title: Project and Workflow source-backed specs
queue.reason: High staleness risk: Project and Workflow code changed heavily after the source-spec cron stopped. Preserve intentional future/target workflow specs where applicable.

queue.title: Signals, debug, and runtime observability telemetry specs
queue.reason: Telemetry and staleness-signal implementation landed after many source-backed specs were generated.

queue.title: Skills, context build, runtime/profile/plugin surfaces
queue.reason: Built-in skill creator, context inspector, native debug tooling, and plugin/profile changes may have moved source behavior.

queue.title: Gateway, channel, CLI, PTY, and operator specs
queue.reason: upstream/dev contains recent PTY/debug tooling work and gateway/channel code changed after the cron run.

queue.title: Store, data, session, and ownership-boundary specs
queue.reason: Data, telemetry, and project/workflow changes can shift canonical ownership boundaries.

queue.title: Web Annotations spec/PRD branch and uncommitted docs triage
queue.reason: Separate Web Annotations work exists on another Ralph branch/worktree. Do not merge it blindly; document whether this loop should ignore, reference, or wait.

queue.title: Full source-marked spec inventory and final stale sweep
queue.reason: After high-risk areas, perform a broad inventory to catch remaining source-backed specs that changed since 2026-05-11.

completed.title: Project and Workflow source-backed specs
notes: Source-backed capability specs were refreshed for configured workflow Project Sessions, explicit workflow start, workflow snapshots/runs/waits/human actions, richer Workflow/XState session view panels, workflow package definition-hash export, schema version 3, and catalog/editor store entities.
Workflow System V1 and Workflow UI Authoring V2 change specs were classified as mixed current/future and preserved as target/change specs rather than rewritten to current implementation.

staleFindings.summary: Projects spec still described simple-chat-only Project workflow creation, but current code supports configured workflow-backed Project Sessions from published catalog versions plus explicit run start.
Workflow package spec omitted definition-hash exports, UI published-version registry validation, schema version 3, and catalog/editor store entities.

Workflow session view spec described a minimal read-only projection; current view includes configured-session execution context, run inspection, definition links, nested links, pending human actions, lifecycle-derived histories, attempts, transfers, and runtime errors.
XState view spec needed current configured-session/run-inspection context and Workflows-tab authoring boundary language.
Workflow System V1 and Workflow UI Authoring V2 change specs are mixed current/future target specs. They were not rewritten to current code during this source-backed capability refresh.

updatedSpecs.summary: Refreshed current Projects workflow behavior for published workflow catalog selection, configured workflow sessions, immutable snapshots, explicit one-run start, bootstrap workflow enrichment, and verification notes.
Added definition-hash export, published-version registry validation, schema version 3, catalog/editor store entities, and updated package test inventory.
Updated high-level Workflow session view contract for richer configured-session context and clarified that detailed component behavior is owned by the XState view spec.
Refreshed XState view behavior for configured/run lifecycle detection, execution shell, run inspection, pending human actions, definition links, and Workflows-tab authoring boundary.

runNotes.note: Initial ledger created before starting Ralph.
Audited q-project-workflow. Updated source-backed capability specs and preserved Workflow System V1 / Workflow UI Authoring V2 change specs as mixed current/future target specs.
